criteria_results.criterion: Runbooks API route exists: GET /api/v1/runbooks returns 401 for unauthed
criteria_results.evidence: src/app/api/v1/runbooks/route.ts:5-11 — GET handler calls supabase.auth.getUser(), returns errorResponse('unauthorized', 'Not authenticated', 401) when !user

criteria_results.criterion: Runbook-steps API route exists: GET /api/v1/runbook-steps returns 401 for unauthed
criteria_results.evidence: src/app/api/v1/runbook-steps/route.ts:5-11 — GET handler calls supabase.auth.getUser(), returns errorResponse('unauthorized', 'Not authenticated', 401) when !user

criteria_results.criterion: Runbooks POST route creates runbook from section (static analysis of route.ts POST handler)
criteria_results.evidence: runbooks/route.ts:32-119 — POST handler takes workspace_id + section_id, resolves name from section if not provided, inserts runbook row, snapshot-copies section's steps into runbook_steps ordered by position_x

criteria_results.criterion: Runbook GET by id returns runbook with steps (static analysis)
criteria_results.evidence: Server-side page at [runbookId]/page.tsx:16-28 uses Promise.all to fetch runbook + runbook_steps (with steps join) from Supabase. API endpoint /api/v1/runbooks/[id] returns runbook only; steps are at separate /api/v1/runbook-steps?runbook_id=... endpoint. Page-level fetch covers the criterion.

criteria_results.criterion: Runbook PATCH updates status (static analysis of [id]/route.ts PATCH handler)
criteria_results.evidence: runbooks/[id]/route.ts:37-83 — EDITABLE_FIELDS includes 'status' and 'completed_at'. PATCH handler filters body to allowed fields, updates runbooks table, returns updated runbook.

criteria_results.criterion: RunbookStep PATCH updates step status (static analysis of runbook-steps/[id]/route.ts PATCH)
criteria_results.evidence: runbook-steps/[id]/route.ts:5-51 — EDITABLE_FIELDS = ['status', 'assigned_to', 'completed_at', 'notes']. PATCH handler updates runbook_steps table, returns updated step.

criteria_results.criterion: Runbook list page renders with filter tabs (static analysis of runbooks-list-view.tsx)
criteria_results.evidence: runbooks-list-view.tsx:23-28 — FILTER_OPTIONS defines 4 tabs: 'all'/'All', 'active'/'Active', 'completed'/'Completed', 'cancelled'/'Cancelled'. Rendered at lines 54-70.

criteria_results.criterion: Runbook view page renders checklist with progress bar (static analysis of runbook-view.tsx)
criteria_results.evidence: runbook-view.tsx:166-193 — progress bar div with dynamic width style and completedCount/total counter. Steps rendered as checklist at lines 196-269.

criteria_results.criterion: 4-state step status transitions: pending → in_progress → completed, pending → skipped (static analysis)
criteria_results.evidence: runbook-view.tsx:38 — STEP_STATUS_ORDER = ['pending', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'skipped']. Button group renders all 4 states (lines 233-253). handleStepStatus (line 73) sets any status directly. isReadOnly guard prevents changes on completed/cancelled runbooks.

criteria_results.criterion: Complete/Cancel buttons use Radix Dialog confirmation (static analysis — IMP-012 verify)
criteria_results.evidence: runbook-view.tsx:283-323 — Two Dialog components: Complete dialog (lines 283-301) with DialogTitle 'Complete runbook?' and consequence description; Cancel dialog (304-323) with DialogTitle 'Cancel runbook?' and 'This action cannot be undone' warning. Both import from @/components/ui/dialog.

criteria_results.criterion: Read-only mode for completed/cancelled runbooks (static analysis of runbook-view.tsx)
criteria_results.evidence: runbook-view.tsx:65 — isReadOnly = runbook.status === 'completed' || runbook.status === 'cancelled'. Applied at: handleStepStatus line 74 (early return), handleNotesChange line 89 (early return), step buttons disabled line 240, notes textarea disabled line 262, banner shown lines 199-205.

criteria_results.criterion: Section detail panel has 'Run as Checklist' button (static analysis of section-detail-panel.tsx)
criteria_results.evidence: section-detail-panel.tsx:332 — button renders '{creating ? "Creating..." : "Run as Checklist"}'. handleRunAsChecklist (lines 97-113) calls createRunbook API then router.push to /w/{workspaceId}/runbooks/{runbook.id}.

criteria_results.criterion: Sidebar navigation includes runbooks link (static analysis of sidebar.tsx)
criteria_results.evidence: sidebar.tsx:42 — nav item { label: 'Runbooks', icon: ClipboardList, href: '/runbooks' } present in nav links array.

criteria_results.criterion: Runbook types defined: Runbook, RunbookStep, RunbookStatus, RunbookStepStatus (static analysis of database.ts)
criteria_results.evidence: database.ts:277-304 — RunbookStatus type ('active'|'completed'|'cancelled'), RunbookStepStatus type ('pending'|'in_progress'|'completed'|'skipped'), Runbook interface (id, workspace_id, section_id, name, status, started_at, completed_at, created_by, created_at, updated_at), RunbookStep interface (id, runbook_id, step_id, status, assigned_to, completed_at, notes, position, created_at, updated_at).

criteria_results.criterion: Migration 016 creates runbooks + runbook_steps tables with RLS (file exists + structure check)
criteria_results.evidence: supabase/migrations/016_runbooks.sql — Both tables created with correct columns, updated_at triggers, indexes. RLS enabled on both tables (lines 67, 81). Four policies each (SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE) using can_access_workspace() directly for runbooks and via EXISTS subquery through runbooks for runbook_steps.

criteria_results.criterion: workspace-shell.tsx reserved paths includes 'runbooks' (static analysis)
criteria_results.evidence: workspace-shell.tsx:47 — 'runbooks' is in the array of reserved path segments excluded from tab ID detection: [..., 'runbooks']

criteria_results.criterion: Playbook page.tsx exists at correct route path (file existence check)
criteria_results.evidence: File confirmed at src/app/(app)/w/[workspaceId]/runbooks/[runbookId]/playbook/page.tsx

criteria_results.criterion: Playbook server page fetches runbook + steps via Supabase (static analysis of playbook/page.tsx)
criteria_results.evidence: playbook/page.tsx:17-29 — Promise.all fetches runbook (with workspace_id guard) and runbook_steps (with steps(id, name) join, ordered by position). notFound() called if !runbook.

criteria_results.criterion: PlaybookView renders fixed overlay (z-50) covering workspace shell (static analysis of playbook-view.tsx)
criteria_results.evidence: playbook-view.tsx:88 — <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-[var(--surface)] flex flex-col">. Empty-state path also uses fixed inset-0 z-50 (line 75).

criteria_results.criterion: Mark Complete & Next button advances to next pending/in_progress step (static analysis)
criteria_results.evidence: playbook-view.tsx:56-60 — after optimistic update, findIndex scans i > currentIndex for steps with status 'pending' or 'in_progress'. If found, setCurrentIndex(nextIdx) advances automatically.

criteria_results.criterion: Optimistic update with rollback on API error (static analysis of handleMarkComplete)
criteria_results.evidence: playbook-view.tsx:45-68 — prev captured before update, steps optimistically updated at line 53. catch block at line 65 rolls back steps state: setSteps((s) => s.map(item => item.id === currentStep.id ? prev : item)). NOTE: currentIndex is NOT rolled back on error (see bugs_found).

criteria_results.criterion: Dot navigation allows jumping to any step (static analysis)
criteria_results.evidence: playbook-view.tsx:197-211 — steps.map renders dot buttons, each with onClick={() => setCurrentIndex(i)}. Completed dots styled bg-[var(--brand)], current dot scaled 125%.

criteria_results.criterion: Progress bar shows completion (static analysis)
criteria_results.evidence: playbook-view.tsx:107-114 — progress bar div with style={{ width: `${progressPct}%` }} where progressPct = Math.round((completedCount / total) * 100).

criteria_results.criterion: Step N of M text displayed (static analysis)
criteria_results.evidence: playbook-view.tsx:101-103 — Step {currentIndex + 1} of {total}

criteria_results.criterion: Completed steps show green checkmark (static analysis)
criteria_results.evidence: playbook-view.tsx:121-132 — when isCompleted, renders CheckCircle2 icon with className 'h-5 w-5 text-[var(--success)]' and 'Completed' label. Dot nav also shows completed dots as bg-[var(--brand)].

criteria_results.criterion: Exit/back navigation returns to runbook view (static analysis)
criteria_results.evidence: playbook-view.tsx:91-97 — Link with href={`/w/${workspaceId}/runbooks/${runbook.id}`} and 'Exit' label with ArrowLeft icon. Same pattern in empty-state path (line 77-82).

criteria_results.criterion: Mobile-responsive layout (max-w-xl or similar constraint, static analysis)
criteria_results.evidence: playbook-view.tsx:118 — <div className="w-full max-w-xl"> constrains step content to 576px max. Dot nav also wrapped in max-w-xl (line 196). Top bar spans full width on mobile without overflow issues.

criteria_results.criterion: Runbook view has 'Playbook' button linking to playbook route (static analysis of runbook-view.tsx)
criteria_results.evidence: runbook-view.tsx:150-155 — Button with variant='secondary' size='sm' asChild, Link href='./playbook' with Play icon and 'Playbook' label. Only rendered when !isReadOnly (active runbooks only).

criteria_results.criterion: Regression: TypeScript compilation clean
criteria_results.evidence: npx tsc --noEmit produced no output (zero errors). Compilation status from EXECUTION_PLAN also marked 'passing' at commit 88aad0e.

criteria_results.criterion: Regression: ESLint clean (0 errors)
criteria_results.evidence: npm run lint: 1 pre-existing warning (flow-canvas.tsx addEdge unused), 0 errors. Warning pre-dates FEAT-048/IMP-012/IMP-013.

criteria_results.criterion: Regression: All 6 runbook-related route files exist
criteria_results.evidence: Confirmed: runbooks/route.ts, runbooks/[id]/route.ts, runbook-steps/route.ts, runbook-steps/[id]/route.ts, runbooks/page.tsx, runbooks/[runbookId]/page.tsx, runbooks/[runbookId]/playbook/page.tsx (7 files).

criteria_results.criterion: Regression: Core nav/shell files unaffected
criteria_results.evidence: sidebar.tsx, workspace-shell.tsx both have correct runbooks exclusions. No signs of regression in core canvas/layout routes.

criteria_results.criterion: Regression: IMP-013 segmented progress bar present in runbooks list
criteria_results.evidence: runbooks-list-view.tsx:115-118 — segmented bar with flex container, completed segment (bg-[var(--brand)]) + in_progress segment (bg-[var(--accent-blue)]/60) shown side-by-side.

quality_gate.note: Live browser testing not performed — Stride dev server not on port 3000 (separate 'Kernel' app is running there). All checks done via static analysis, tsc, eslint, and source code review.

bugs_found.description: In PlaybookView.handleMarkComplete, when the API call fails after an optimistic update, the steps state is correctly rolled back but currentIndex is NOT rolled back. If auto-advance fired (i.e., a next pending/in_progress step was found), the user ends up viewing a different step after the rollback — the step whose status was supposed to change now shows its original status on a different card, causing visual desync.
bugs_found.steps_to_reproduce: 1. Open Playbook mode on a runbook with 3+ pending steps. 2. Click 'Mark Complete & Next' on step 1 while offline or with network throttled to simulate failure. 3. Observe: UI advances to step 2, then the API call fails, step 1 reverts to 'pending' in state — but focus remains on step 2, not step 1.

improvements_found.observation: Progress bar in RunbookView uses completedCount/total, meaning skipped steps count against progress (e.g., 0/5 even if 2 are intentionally skipped). Users who skip steps to declare them irrelevant may feel the progress bar misrepresents their actual completion.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H1: Visibility of system status — the status shown should match user's mental model of 'done'
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Consider counting skipped + completed as 'resolved' for progress, or add a secondary skipped segment to the progress bar (similar to IMP-013 in list view). Alternatively, show (completed + skipped) / total with a tooltip explanation.

improvements_found.observation: PlaybookView has no way to skip a step (only Mark Complete or navigate away). Users who want to deliberately skip a step in playbook mode must exit to the runbook checklist view, skip there, then re-enter playbook mode.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H7: Flexibility and efficiency of use — power users should be able to accomplish tasks without extra navigation
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Add a secondary 'Skip' action button (smaller, below 'Mark Complete & Next') in playbook mode for steps that are not yet completed.

improvements_found.observation: The 'Playbook' button is hidden when a runbook is completed or cancelled (isReadOnly). There is no way to review a completed runbook in the focused playbook UI even in read-only mode. Users who want to do a post-completion review must use the dense checklist view.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H6: Recognition rather than recall — familiar/preferred interfaces should remain accessible
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Allow the Playbook button even in read-only mode, with 'Mark Complete & Next' disabled (already handled by isReadOnly check in handleMarkComplete).
